Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The facility previously estimated releases using published emission factors to quantify storage/handling releases. Source testing was conducted by the facility in August 2020. The facility used the resulting source test emission factor for 2020 quantification of storage/handling releases, and will continue to use this methodology in future reporting years.
